pages.title: Using All 6 Faces
pages.text: $(bold)Maximum throughput$(): Configure all 6 faces$(br2)$(bold)Example Setup$(): NORTH: PULL → Coal Importer SOUTH: PULL → Iron Ore Importer EAST:  PULL → Gold Ore Importer WEST:  PULL → Copper Ore Importer UP:    PUSH ← Alloy Exporter DOWN:  PUSH ← Slag Exporter$(br2)$(bold)Layout$():       [Alloy Chest]            ↑ (UP face) [Coal] → [PreFab] ← [Gold]            ↓ (DOWN face)       [Slag Chest]$(br2)(Plus SOUTH and WEST faces with more inputs)

pages.title: Directional Optimization
pages.text: $(bold)Pattern$(): Place chests based on access$(br2)$(bold)Vertical factory$() (use UP/DOWN faces): [Chest]    ↓ (hopper) [PreFab UP face]    ↓ (hopper) [PreFab DOWN face]    ↓ (hopper) [Chest]$(br2)$(bold)Horizontal factory$() (use NORTH/SOUTH/EAST/WEST): [Chest] → [PreFab] → [Chest]$(br2)---
